function.content:
---
record_type: invoice
invoice_number: INV-0010
alias: helios_checklist_pack_invoice
issued_on: 2026-04-21
total_eur: 780
counterparty: Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH
project: Helios Workflow Sprint
related_entity: Claudia Reiter
lines:
  - item: checklist rewrite and rollout pack
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 780
    line_eur: 780
---
# Helios checklist rewrite invoice

```text
+----------------+--------------------------------+
| field          | value                          |
+----------------+--------------------------------+
| record_type    | invoice                        |
| invoice_number | INV-0010                       |
| alias          | helios_checklist_pack_invoice  |
| issued_on      | 2026-04-21                     |
| total_eur      | 780                            |
| counterparty   | Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH |
| project        | Helios Workflow Sprint         |
| related_entity | Claudia Reiter                 |
+----------------+--------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                               | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | checklist rewrite and rollout pack | 1   | 780      | 780      |
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                              |     |          | 780      |
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

Recent client-visible invoice tied to the sprint deliverable rather than open-ended product thinking.

function.message: Processed the oldest inbox item by updating `50_finance/invoices/2026_04_21__eur_000780__inv_0010__helios_checklist_pack_invoice.md` with invoice YAML frontmatter extracted from visible note data, while preserving the full original note body verbatim below the frontmatter. Then removed the processed inbox file `00_inbox/000_next-task.md`.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap (tree/read/context), read lane AGENTS and relevant workflows/schemas before task work, preserved full existing note body under frontmatter, kept diff focused, and deleted inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request explicitly asked for OCR-style extraction into YAML frontmatter for the specified invoice file. The source note contained all required invoice fields and line-item data defined in `99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md`, enabling a complete, exact migration without guessing. Workflow docs required deleting the inbox item after successful completion.
